name: 90"x20" Solid Texture Table Runner Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your dining experience for any occasion with this Solid Texture Table Runner from Threshold™. The woven table runner showcases a raised boxed pattern in an ivory hue and is decorated with fringe accents on all sides for added appeal. Made from 100% cotton material, this woven table runner helps protect your table from accidental spills and is suitable for any occasion. Plus, it's machine washable for easy maintenance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
